title: Eva Panel
wikitext:
[]: Eva Panel             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Wed Mar 19, 2008 4:43 am Wow. Is this the right forum for this..? o_o;; Anyway.. Have any of you ever coordinated or attended a panel about Eva (like at a convention)? If not, and you were the coordinator of one such hour of mindfuckery (no mercy for the n00bs that show up, of course XD), what would you include as topics of interest? ..I mean, the last con I went to had a panel about the Venture Brothers. Surely.. someone, somewhere has had one on Eva. X3

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 19, 2008 5:05 am Aaron and Reichu have done Eva panels before, I believe at Otakon. I think one from last year was "Blink and you'll miss it".

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Mar 19, 2008 9:23 am yes, but not as "V"

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Mar 19, 2008 3:34 pm I went to an Eva panel hosted by Greenfield and Grant. That's why I think both of them are dumbasses now. A classic case of you shouldn't judge people on hearsay but when you personally hear those people say those some things you can only shake your head in disappointment.

[]:             Quote Post by StrawHatterAlice » Wed Mar 19, 2008 3:46 pm I went to the "Philosophy of Evangelion" panel at Ohayocon this year. It was a pretty good panel. It was more fun, probably, because I cosplayed Asuka to it, but it wasn't bad. I did, however, make the mistake of going to it with my sister who has only seen the movies. X3 Needless to say, she now thinks Eva is even more of a weird, perverted show than she did before. :P I don't care though. I love it.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Wed Mar 19, 2008 6:00 pm On this, anyone going to SakuraCon in Seattle? If a forum member was there at the same time as me that would be interesting. [I'm almost afraid I'll see Reichu, no offense meant]

Article: Eva Panel
[]: Eva Panel             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Wed Mar 19, 2008 4:43 am Wow. Is this the right forum for this..? o_o;; Anyway.. Have any of you ever coordinated or attended a panel about Eva (like at a convention)? If not, and you were the coordinator of one such hour of mindfuckery (no mercy for the n00bs that show up, of course XD), what would you include as topics of interest? ..I mean, the last con I went to had a panel about the Venture Brothers. Surely.. someone, somewhere has had one on Eva. X3

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 19, 2008 5:05 am Aaron and Reichu have done Eva panels before, I believe at Otakon. I think one from last year was "Blink and you'll miss it".

A classic case of you shouldn't judge people on hearsay but when you personally hear those people say those some things you can only shake your head in disappointment.

It was more fun, probably, because I cosplayed Asuka to it, but it wasn't bad. I did, however, make the mistake of going to it with my sister who has only seen the movies. X3 Needless to say, she now thinks Eva is even more of a weird, perverted show than she did before. :P I don't care though. I love it.
